issues.diagnosis: Azure is still holding the Key Vault name in soft-delete, so the bootstrap deployment cannot reuse that global name yet.
manual_commands: az deployment group show -g [[resource_group]] -n [[deployment_name]] --query properties.error --output json
az deployment operation group list -g [[resource_group]] -n keyvault --output json
az keyvault list-deleted --resource-type vault --output table
az keyvault purge --name [[failed_resource_name]] --location [[location]]

issues.diagnosis: The deployment hit a Key Vault global name conflict. Azure will not allow two vaults anywhere to share the same DNS name.
manual_commands: az deployment group show -g [[resource_group]] -n [[deployment_name]] --query properties.error --output json
az deployment operation group list -g [[resource_group]] -n keyvault --output json

any_of: denied: requested access to the resource is denied

issues.diagnosis: The Container App reached GitHub Container Registry, but GHCR denied anonymous access to the configured image. This usually means the GHCR package is still private even if the GitHub repository is public. The expected Azure runtime image is the SAO app image built from docker/Dockerfile, not the standalone installer image.
manual_commands: az deployment group show -g [[resource_group]] -n container-app --query properties.error --output json
az deployment operation group list -g [[resource_group]] -n container-app --output json
az containerapp show -g [[resource_group]] -n sao-app --output json
docker manifest inspect [[image_reference]]
Confirm the GitHub Container Registry package for [[image_reference]] is set to Public in GitHub package settings

any_of: denied: requested access to the resource is denied

issues.diagnosis: The Container App reached the registry, but Azure could not pull the configured SAO application image because the registry denied access.
manual_commands: az deployment group show -g [[resource_group]] -n container-app --query properties.error --output json
az deployment operation group list -g [[resource_group]] -n container-app --output json
az containerapp show -g [[resource_group]] -n sao-app --output json
az containerapp registry set -n sao-app -g [[resource_group]] --server ghcr.io --username <github-username> --password <github-personal-access-token>
az containerapp update -n sao-app -g [[resource_group]] --image [[image_reference]]

issues.diagnosis: The Container App image reference does not resolve to a pullable SAO application image in the registry. Azure should point at the production SAO app image path, not the installer helper image.
manual_commands: az deployment group show -g [[resource_group]] -n container-app --query properties.error --output json
az deployment operation group list -g [[resource_group]] -n container-app --output json
az containerapp update -n sao-app -g [[resource_group]] --image [[image_reference]]

any_of: tls upgrade required by connect options but sqlx was built without tls support enabled
sqlx was built without tls support enabled

issues.diagnosis: The SAO container started, but its Rust binary was built without SQLx TLS support while Azure Database for PostgreSQL requires TLS connections.
manual_commands: az containerapp show -g [[resource_group]] -n sao-app --output json
az containerapp revision list -g [[resource_group]] -n sao-app --all --output json
az containerapp replica list -g [[resource_group]] -n sao-app --output json
az containerapp logs show -g [[resource_group]] -n sao-app --tail 50 --output json
az containerapp logs show -g [[resource_group]] -n sao-app --type system --tail 50 --output json

issues.diagnosis: The Container App resource exists, but its revision failed to become healthy.
manual_commands: az containerapp show -g [[resource_group]] -n sao-app --output json
az containerapp revision list -g [[resource_group]] -n sao-app --all --output json
az containerapp logs show -g [[resource_group]] -n sao-app --type system --tail 50 --output json

issues.diagnosis: The target subscription is missing a required Azure resource provider registration.
manual_commands: az provider show --namespace Microsoft.App --query registrationState -o tsv
az provider show --namespace Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL --query registrationState -o tsv
az provider show --namespace Microsoft.KeyVault --query registrationState -o tsv
az provider register --namespace <missing-provider-namespace>

issues.diagnosis: Azure rejected the deployment because the selected region or SKU does not currently have capacity or quota available.
manual_commands: az deployment group show -g [[resource_group]] -n [[deployment_name]] --query properties.error --output json
az deployment operation group list -g [[resource_group]] -n [[deployment_name]] --output json

az deployment operation group list -g [[resource_group]] -n [[deployment_name]] --output json
